# Insert the exact command used for the relevant SUMO run below.
# Example tabular run:
cd /workspace/DQNMedian50/DQNMedian50/sumo
python3 src/sumo_tabular_median50.py \
    --train-episodes 500 \
    --test-episodes 300 \
    --max-episode-steps 500 \
    --epsilon 0.2 \
    --gamma 0.99 \
    --seed 42
